text.tspan: Connect address lines to "1" outputs of MA latches
(U30, U27, U25, U22). The bit order is here "correct"
but should also work if rearranged.
INH lines connect to the MB buffer
SNS# lines also connect to the MB buffer.
The SNS# lines must be CUT on the core PCB,
Remember to fix select jumpers etc.
Perhaps we could have used the U1
AND gate on the core board instead
of our U9. But U1 uses weird logic
levels driven by +V BIAS, so I'm
OR gate for creative combination of signals
to produce WE# pulse at the right time
